analogues.event: Iran's first direct strike on Israel
analogues.source: Direct Iran-Israel exchange; rapid de-escalation, no supply impact

analogues.event: Israel launches large-scale strikes on Hezbollah
analogues.source: Reuters: ~1,600 Israeli airstrikes on Hezbollah; no direct oil supply impact; Iran proxy escalation fear elevated
~180 missiles; market priced strikes on Iranian energy that did not materialize

analogues.event: Hamas attack on Israel; Gaza war begins
analogues.source: No direct oil supply hit; risk premium on wider escalation

analogues.event: Houthi Red Sea shipping attacks escalate
analogues.source: Shipping rerouted via Cape of Good Hope; oil supply unaffected, freight spiked
